transcript.text:
[45 years of tradition]
[Pork bulgogi grilled with charcoal briquette]
[A popular place for the locals: Jinmi House]
[Their special lettuce wrap]
[Put the kimbap inside]
[Tasty]
The wrap is delicious
Hello everyone
I'm scheduled for the program 'Hometown Report' tomorrow
So I came to Jeonju today
They have this unique place here
Where you put Kimbap (seaweed roll) inside the lettuce wrap, so I'm here
[Jeonju Wansan District] [Jinmi House]
[45 Years of Tradition!]
Looks a bit run down Let's head in
Hello

10 servings of pork bulgogi
And 3 orders of kimbap, please
That might be too much for 1 person
It's alright I'll take the same order
[You won't finish it]
Is this 1 serving? Yes
Thank you
Thank you x2
[There's more]
In order
[Tzuyang=A server's worst nightmare]
Thank you x3
[Almost done]
I'm going to hurry and dig in before it gets cold
Let's get a bite of one of the fresh ones
Looks so good This one is fatty

Chewy
There's a way to eat this
Put the kimbap on the lettuce
A bit of ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
[Their special way to eat the wrap] Just like this
Delicious
People would think it won't be too different from putting just rice
But the seasoning on the kimbap makes a difference
It's really not bad with kimbap
Thank you
This is for the kimbap
It's chojang? (Sweet & tangy chili sauce)
I've had kimbap with chojang before at Daejeon
That's good
Kind of tastes like bibimbap
Thank you

[She just now sees the plates]
There's no way
Some garlic too
And 1 kimbap
This is delicious
I can taste the smoky flavor
[A big mouthful]
The taste is very..
It has a strong flavor
It can get greasy, so some people not might like it
[Bulgogi is always delicious!]
It's more on the saltier side,
So it's perfect to eat it with kimbap
I like eating it like this
1 kimbap, 4 pieces of meat
[Kimbap escapee]

[You're going back in]
Wrap!
It's huge
I feel overloaded on vegetables today
[You guys need to try the kimbap lettuce wrap too]
I love how it has a lot of fat
That's the best part It's not as good if it's just meat
It's chewier now that it's been sitting here
This would go well with alcohol
This one's a little too big
[Some fishcake soup]
4 pieces
And kimbap
This has been passed down for 45 years
2 generations
45 years ago...

I wasn't even born yet
I can definitely taste the experience?
It tastes like something I had when I was younger
This should taste good with some sesame oil
It's because it's good with kimbap
I just think it would go well with it
What's this? Sesame oil
Really? Thank you!
You're good at eating
I was perplexed
She ordered so much food and I was caught off guard
How do you like the food? It's tasty
Enjoy your meal Thank you
She ate 8 plates already She cleared them
Where's all that going to? She's not even fat
The best that I've ever seen

My shirt is clean!
I didn't get any on it
Not even a drop
This is a first
Let's dip some sesame oil
Yummy
That's perfect for me
Everything is good with sesame oil though
How is it so good?
[Spicy]
Spicy garlic
I'm afraid to eat garlic now
Let's try 1 more
[This one's okay]
[Nevermind]
[2 in a row]

I finished the basket of lettuce
It's all gone
This has never happened before
[9th plate finished]
Did you eat it all? All 10 plates?
Yes
Was it good? Yes, it was deliciou
Thank you
I came to Jinmi House located in Jeonju to eat a meal
I've had a lot of meals of bulgogi and kimbap separately,
But eating it all together in a lettuce wrap was a new experience for me
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
